summary: Stunning China Cat Sunflower performance with a mind‑bending transition into Riders, though recording details are unclear.
review: The reviewer raves about an almost transcendent rendition of China Cat Sunflower and the seamless, space‑y transition into Riders on the Storm, describing it as “traveling at light speed in slow motion.” No comments were made about the source or fidelity of the recording, so its technical quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: The single review is overwhelmingly positive about the musical performance, but provides no information on recording quality, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix, or source; reviewers focus solely on the performance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The transition from China Cat Sunflower into Riders on the Storm is highlighted as a spectacular, other‑worldly flow.
